weapon.BRIGANDS_CALLING.skill.DETONATE_B.text: Cryo DMG Dealt +{cryst_dmg_up:0.0%}. When the wielder applies Cryo Infliction via battle skills or ultimates, the wielder gains Cryo DMG Dealt +{cryst_dmg_up2:0.0%} for {duration:0}s. When the wielder's battle skill or ultimate applies Arts Susceptibility, the target enemy suffers Arts DMG Taken +{spell_damage_taken_up:0.0%} for {duration2:0}s. The two effects apply separately and do not stack with themselves.
